brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze zone ingest of College Scorecard institution-level cost data. Downloads bulk CSV from ed.gov, extracts ~24 cost/price fields from the 1,900+ column source, filters to PREDDEG=3 (bachelor's) OR ICLEVEL=1 (4-year), deduplicates on UNITID, converts PrivacySuppressed sentinel values to null, coerces types, and appends to raw.college_scorecard_institution Iceberg table. This data joins to the existing field-of-study raw table on UNITID and enables honest ROI (net_price_annual x 4 x loan_pct) rather than historical median debt.

brightsmith_runtimeMetrics.nullGrainSkipped: rows with null unitid skipped during flatten

documentation.description: Ingest U.S. Department of Education College Scorecard institution-level cost data (cost of attendance, net price, tuition, room & board) into the bronze zone. Downloads bulk CSV, handles both plain and ZIP-wrapped responses, filters to 4-year bachelor's-granting institutions (PREDDEG=3 OR ICLEVEL=1), converts PrivacySuppressed values to null, coerces numeric strings to long/int/double, deduplicates on UNITID (first row wins), and appends to raw.college_scorecard_institution Iceberg table. Provides the institution-level cost structure missing from the field-of-study file.

unitid.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to long integer via int(). Used as dedup grain key (first row per UNITID wins). Null if parse fails; rows with null unitid are skipped during flatten().

instnm.transformationDescription: Direct string copy with whitespace stripped. PrivacySuppressed/PS/NA/NULL/empty sentinel values converted to null.

stabbr.transformationDescription: Direct 2-letter state abbreviation string copy. Sentinel values converted to null.

control.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to integer via int(). Values: 1=Public, 2=Private nonprofit, 3=Private for-profit. Used downstream in Silver to pick NPT4_PUB vs NPT4_PRIV. Null if parse fails.

preddeg.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to integer via int(). Pre-filtered: rows retained only if PREDDEG=3 (predominantly bachelor's) OR ICLEVEL=1 (4-year institution). Null if parse fails.

costt4_a.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Represents average cost of attendance for academic-year programs (tuition + fees + books + room & board + living expenses). Sentinel values converted to null.

costt4_p.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Represents average cost of attendance for program-year programs. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt4_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Average net price for public institutions (COA minus grants/scholarships). Sentinel values converted to null.

npt4_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Average net price for private institutions (COA minus grants/scholarships). Sentinel values converted to null.

npt41_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Public-institution net price for families in the $0-$30K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt42_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Public-institution net price for families in the $30K-$48K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt43_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Public-institution net price for families in the $48K-$75K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt44_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Public-institution net price for families in the $75K-$110K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt45_pub.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Public-institution net price for families in the $110K+ income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt41_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Private-institution net price for families in the $0-$30K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt42_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Private-institution net price for families in the $30K-$48K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt43_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Private-institution net price for families in the $48K-$75K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt44_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Private-institution net price for families in the $75K-$110K income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

npt45_priv.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Private-institution net price for families in the $110K+ income bracket. Sentinel values converted to null.

tuitionfee_in.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). In-state tuition and fees (tuition only, no housing). Sentinel values converted to null.

tuitionfee_out.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Out-of-state tuition and fees (tuition only, no housing). Sentinel values converted to null.

roomboard_on.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). On-campus room and board cost. Sentinel values converted to null.

roomboard_off.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Off-campus (not with family) room and board cost. Sentinel values converted to null.

booksupply.transformationDescription: Parsed from CSV string, coerced to double via float(). Estimated books and supplies cost. Sentinel values converted to null.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-generated UTC timestamp at time of ingest. Added by BaseIngestor.ingest(), not from source data.

source_url.transformationDescription: Framework-generated field recording the download URL used for this ingest run (https://ed-public-download.app.cloud.gov/downloads/Most-Recent-Cohorts-Institution.csv).

source_method.transformationDescription: Framework-generated field recording the fetch method name ('bulk_csv_download').

load_date.transformationDescription: Framework-generated date (UTC) of the ingest run. Derived from ingested_at.
